# Angular Governance Program

Canonical: https://angularcleanup.shop
Sitemap: https://angularcleanup.shop/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://angularcleanup.shop/robots.txt

## Service
Angular Governance Program provides a governance-first Angular and Nx stabilization program focused on measurable cost-of-change reduction, safer upgrades, and clearer ownership.

## Primary Audience
- Engineering managers and directors responsible for delivery predictability
- Technical leads responsible for architectural governance in Angular/Nx codebases

## Key Public Pages
- https://angularcleanup.shop/
- https://angularcleanup.shop/for-managers
- https://angularcleanup.shop/for-technical-leads
- https://angularcleanup.shop/how-it-works
- https://angularcleanup.shop/ai-governance
- https://angularcleanup.shop/book
- https://angularcleanup.shop/privacy

## Conversion
Request an executive introduction call: https://angularcleanup.shop/book

## Constraints
- No rewrites
- No feature-team ownership
- Incremental, reversible, production-safe changes
- AI supports governance, not replacement

## Machine-Friendly Detail
See: https://angularcleanup.shop/llms-full.txt
